chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 180 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 16.03.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case None present for applicant Ms. Sana Memon, APG The offences with which the applicant is charged are either bailable or fall within the non-prohibitory clause of Section 497 Cr.P.C. except Section 337-A(iv) the primary punishment of which is the payment of Arsh, imprisonment may also be given at the discretion of the court. Keeping in mind the principles enunciated in the case of Tariq Bashir & 5 others v. The State (PLD 1995 S.C. 34), I do not see any exceptional or extra-ordinary reason to deny bail to the applicant. Given the above, the applicant is admitted to post-arrest bail against a surety of Rs. 1,00,000/- (One Lac) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of learned trial court.. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
